calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Montgomery for Miriam Haas (Petitioner).

The Court stated that everything appeared in order and granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Shannon.

Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Continued To Nov-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Montgomery for Miriam Haas.

Mr. Montgomery stated that the supplemental Inventory and Appraisal was with the Referee. The matter was continued to November 12, 2008 for status on the Petition For Final Distribution.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Wong.
